hooks.command: cat | nu --stdin -c '$in | from json | get session_id' | xargs -I{} $HOME/.config/claude/marketplace/plugins/caffeinate/.claude-plugin/bin/caffeinate-ctl activate {} || true
cat | nu --stdin -c '$in | from json | get session_id' | xargs -I{} $HOME/.config/claude/marketplace/plugins/caffeinate/.claude-plugin/bin/caffeinate-ctl deactivate {} || true

cat | nu --stdin -c '$in | from json | get session_id' | xargs -I{} $HOME/.config/claude/marketplace/plugins/caffeinate/.claude-plugin/bin/caffeinate-ctl activate {} || true
cat | nu --stdin -c '$in | from json | get session_id' | xargs -I{} $HOME/.config/claude/marketplace/plugins/caffeinate/.claude-plugin/bin/caffeinate-ctl deactivate {} || true
cat | nu --stdin -c '$in | from json | get session_id' | xargs -I{} $HOME/.config/claude/marketplace/plugins/caffeinate/.claude-plugin/bin/caffeinate-ctl activate {} || true

cat | nu --stdin -c 'let j = ($in | from json); [$j.session_id (($j.background_tasks? | default [] | length) > 0 | into string)] | str join (char space)' | xargs $HOME/.config/claude/marketplace/plugins/caffeinate/.claude-plugin/bin/caffeinate-ctl stop || true

cat | nu --stdin -c 'let j = ($in | from json); [$j.session_id (($j.background_tasks? | default [] | length) > 0 | into string)] | str join (char space)' | xargs $HOME/.config/claude/marketplace/plugins/caffeinate/.claude-plugin/bin/caffeinate-ctl stop || true
cat | nu --stdin -c '$in | from json | get session_id' | xargs -I{} $HOME/.config/claude/marketplace/plugins/caffeinate/.claude-plugin/bin/caffeinate-ctl deactivate {} || true
